name: @zk-pob/zk
description: Circom circuit, trusted-setup build, and snarkjs proving wrapper

scripts.gen:testdata: npm run build && node genfixture.mjs && snarkjs groth16 fullprove input.json build/proof_of_backing_js/proof_of_backing.wasm build/proof_of_backing_final.zkey proof.json public.json && node gentestdata.mjs
